leadText: The Savanna Biome (Japanese: サバンナエリア Savanna Area) is a large biome within the Terarium, located in the Unova region's Blueberry Academy.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] The Savanna Biome is large with vast desert plains, dry grasslands, large rock formations and mud wallows, many Pokemon will fly or dash across the savanna or rest on the rocks, sometimes taking a dip in the watering holes and mud wallows.

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Contents 1 Places of interest 1.1 Savanna Plaza 1.2 Savanna Outdoor Classroom 1.3 Savanna Rest Areas Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Savanna Plaza [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Savanna Plaza The Savanna Plaza is located in the southwestern portion of the biome. The player can challenge Crispin of the BB League here. Savanna Outdoor Classroom [ edit | edit source ] Located at the center of the biome, the outdoor classroom becomes a stop for Flying Taxis once visited. Savanna Rest Areas [ edit | edit source ] Two rest areas can be found in the Savanna Biome. Savanna Rest Area 1 is located in the southeastern portion of the biome, by the Blueberry Academy entrance. Savanna Rest Area 2 is located in the northwestern portion of the biome, near the border to the Coastal Biome ; a guidance counselor is found here, who will reward the player for defeating Trainers in the Savanna Biome. The player can heal their Pokémon here and purchase items from vending machines . Perrin is found at Savanna Rest Area 1. She'll send the player on a side quest for Gouging Fire and Raging Bolt S / Iron Boulder and Iron Crown V after the player registers 200 Pokémon in the Blueberry Pokédex .
